nasb.text: to the place of the altar which he had made there formerly; and there Abram called on the name of the Lord.

esv.text: to the place where he had made an altar at the first. And there Abram called upon the name of the Lord.

cnv.text: 也是他築頭一座祭壇的地方，亞伯蘭就在那裡求告耶和華的名。

csbs.text: 也是他原先造祭坛的地方。亚伯兰就在那里呼求耶和华的名。
